diagrams.title: Virtual Address Translation in Paging
diagrams.description: Shows how a virtual address is translated to physical address using page table and MMU
diagrams.purpose: Understanding address translation process in paged memory systems

diagrams.title: Page Replacement Decision Flowchart
diagrams.description: Illustrates the decision process when a page fault occurs and no free frames are available
elements: Yes: load page, No: choose victim page
diagrams.purpose: Understanding page fault handling and replacement algorithm selection

diagrams.title: Memory Management Techniques Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of contiguous allocation, paging, and segmentation approaches
diagrams.purpose: Comparing different memory management schemes and their memory layout
